title: Adaptive surfing in Florianópolis: how to start
excerpt: Florianópolis offers adaptive surfing lessons year-round — free classes for people with disabilities, with adapted boards and trained volunteers.
alt: Surfer with adaptive board catching a wave at Praia Mole, Florianópolis
caption: Praia Mole, 2024

content.text: Florianópolis is one of the only cities in Brazil with year-round adaptive surfing programs, with both public and NGO-run sessions every week.
Most adaptive sessions happen at Praia Mole and Joaquina, on weekend mornings.
Larger waves, more experienced instructors. Best for intermediate surfers.
Smaller, more predictable waves. Recommended for first-timers.
